mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS rate lowers the discount rate on equities and signals easier financial conditions, so the S&P 500 should rise over the next 20 trading days when policy is being cut or held at low levels after prior declines.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered 20-day forward SPX returns are not higher than unconditional returns, or if the sign flips and rate declines are followed by negative returns in more than 55% of cases over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above its recent level signals labor-market deterioration and future earnings risk, which should compress equity valuations and produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.2 pp versus its value 3 months earlier
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE increase triggers are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of observations, or if rank correlation between UNRATE changes and forward returns is near zero over a 5-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS is expanding and HOUST is also rising, the economy is simultaneously supported by consumer spending and housing activity, creating a broad demand upswing that should lift S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition RSAFS growth positive and HOUST trend positive does not outperform each series alone, or if the conditional 60-day SPX hit rate falls below 50% over any 4-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in INDPRO indicates manufacturing and industrial weakness that precedes earnings downgrades and risk-off pricing, so S&P 500 returns should be negative over the next 20 trading days when industrial production contracts materially.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls by at least 0.5% over the latest month
failure_condition: Reject if monthly INDPRO declines are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns more than 55% of the time, or if the signal loses explanatory power after controlling for recent CPI and UNRATE changes.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in GDPC1 growth and RSAFS growth signals a broad demand recession, causing analysts to cut profit expectations and driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if joint negative growth in GDPC1 and RSAFS is not associated with lower 60-day SPX returns than either series alone, or if conditional returns are not statistically below baseline over any 6-quarter window.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation is falling while FEDFUNDS remains elevated, real policy rates tighten and liquidity conditions worsen, which should pressure equity valuations and generate negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation falls below FEDFUNDS
failure_condition: Reject if disinflation-plus-high-rate episodes do not produce below-baseline 5-day SPX returns, or if the conditional hit rate for negative returns is under 55% across any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: In a stable unemployment regime, a lower PAYEMS reading than the prior month implies slower payroll growth and weaker income momentum, which should lead to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS declines month over month for 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: Reject if two-month PAYEMS declines are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the effect disappears when UNRATE is stable within +/- 0.1 pp.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in INDPRO after a prior contraction signals cyclical inventory and production recovery, which should support earnings expectations and produce positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days, especially when labor conditions are not worsening.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises for 3 consecutive months after a prior 2-month decline
failure_condition: Reject if production rebounds are not followed by higher 60-day SPX returns than the unconditional average, or if the effect is absent when UNRATE is flat or falling.
